output.code: import json, re, unicodedata, os, textwrap, itertools, math, sys, difflib, random

qpath="/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hpath="/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(qpath,'r') as f:
    q=json.load(f)
with open(hpath,'r') as f:
    h=json.load(f)
len(q), len(h)

# define normalization: remove tashkeel, tatweel, punctuation, unify hamza forms
import re
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0657-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
def normalize(s):
    if s is None: return ''
    s = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', s)
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    # unify hamza forms: أإآ to ا
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

orig = "أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ، اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ وَاعْبُدُوا مَنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ يَعْبُدُهُ أَحَدٌ قَبْلَكُمْ، وَكُلُّ شَيْءٍ يَعْبُدُهُ اللَّهُ، وَإِنَّمَا الْعِبَادَةُ مَا أَحَبَّ اللَّهُ أَنْ يُعْبَدَ"
norm_orig = normalize(orig)
norm_orig

# Search hadith texts fields hadithTxt or Matn for approximate
def get_text(entry):
    for k in ['hadithTxt','Matn','matn','hadith_text','text','hadith']:
        if k in entry and entry[k]:
            return entry[k]
    return ''
cands=[]
for i,e in enumerate(h):
    t=get_text(e)
    if not t: continue
    n=normalize(t)
    if all(tok in n for tok in norm_orig.split()[:3]): # rough filter
        # compute ratio
        seq = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, n, norm_orig)
        ratio = seq.find_longest_match(0,len(n),0,len(norm_orig)).size / max(1,len(norm_orig))
        cands.append((ratio,i,t))
cands_sorted=sorted(cands, key=lambda x:-x[0])[:20]
len(cands_sorted)

# Let's search broadly for phrase beginnings like "ايها الناس اعبدوا الله"
key = normalize("أيها الناس اعبدوا الله")
hits=[]
for i,e in enumerate(h):
    t=get_text(e)
    n=normalize(t)
    if "ايها الناس اعبدوا الله" in n:
        hits.append((i,t))
len(hits)

# Search for "وانما العباده ما احب الله ان يعبد"
phrase = normalize("وإنما العبادة ما أحب الله أن يعبد")
hits=[]
for i,e in enumerate(h):
    t=get_text(e)
    n=normalize(t)
    if phrase in n:
        hits.append((i,t))
len(hits)

hits=[]
for e in q:
    t=e.get('ayah_text','')
    if not t: continue
    if "اعبدوا" in t and "ايها" in t:
        hits.append(t)
len(hits), hits[:5]

# normalize quran and search tokens
phrase=normalize("أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ")
hits=[]
for e in q:
    t=e.get('ayah_text','')
    n=normalize(t)
    if "ايها" in n and "اعبدوا الله" in n:
        hits.append(t)
len(hits)

phrase=normalize("إنما العبادة ما أحب الله أن يعبد")
res=[]
for i,e in enumerate(h):
    t=get_text(e); n=normalize(t)
    if all(tok in n for tok in normalize("انما العباده ما احب الله ان يعبد").split()):
        res.append((i,t))
len(res)

phrase=normalize("ما أحب الله أن يعبد")
hits=[]
for i,e in enumerate(h):
    t=get_text(e); n=normalize(t)
    if phrase in n:
        hits.append((i,t))
len(hits)

# Show some that include "اعبدوا"
c=[]
for i,e in enumerate(h):
    t=get_text(e); n=normalize(t)
    if "يا ايها الناس" in n and "اعبدوا" in n:
        c.append((i,t))
len(c)

# Find Baqarah 21
cands=[]
for e in q:
    t=e.get('ayah_text','')
    if "يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اعْبُدُوا رَبَّكُمُ" in t:
        cands.append(t)
cands

content.text: {"correction":"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اعْبُدُوا رَبَّكُمُ الَّذِي خَلَقَكُمْ وَالَّذِينَ مِنْ قَبْلِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَتَّقُونَ"}
